title: glycosmis mauritiana var. angustifolia
intro: Glycosmis mauritiana var. angustifolia is a plant species belonging to the Rutaceae family, also known as the citrus family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antidiabetic properties. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as an infusion, decoction, or extract, and is often used in traditional remedies in parts of Asia.
